title: Binary Search Tree Operations
description: A flowchart illustrating the core operations on a Binary Search Tree (BST), including insertion, searching, finding min/max values, and counting nodes.
relationships: New Node is inserted by comparing its value to the Current Node and traversing Left if smaller or Right if larger
Searching follows the same comparison and traversal logic as Insertion
Find Minimum traverses repeatedly to the Left until a leaf node
Find Maximum traverses repeatedly to the Right until a leaf node
Count Nodes recursively sums the count of nodes in the Left Subtree + Right Subtree + 1
